title: olearia stellulata
intro: Olearia stellulata, also known as star daisy, is a flowering plant species native to Australia, characterized by its white or pink flowers and a shrub-like growth habit. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which make it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Olearia stellulata include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed or used topically to harness its medicinal properties.
